name: cognigy
description: NiCE Cognigy Plugin — create, test, and manage AI Agents on the NiCE Cognigy platform

cognigy_api_base_url.title: Cognigy API base URL
cognigy_api_base_url.description: Your Cognigy instance API URL. Use https://api-trial.cognigy.ai if you are on the trial.

cognigy_api_key.title: Cognigy API key
cognigy_api_key.description: Find it in Cognigy.AI → User Menu → My Profile → API Keys.
